3 
ACO_MOS 
LABEL: 
Accountable Care Organization (ACO) Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in an accountable care organization (ACO) in the 
calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: ACO_MOS 
LONG NAME: ACO_MOS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
Managed Care 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 
VALUES: 
0–12 (Number of months)
